goal: Record DeepSeek-native main-loop API failures as classified FailureObserved state payloads when yoagent surfaces an exhausted provider error.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: The DeepSeek transport policy can classify diagnostic failures, but real prompt-loop API failures remain unstructured stderr text and never become state evidence for state why, replay, or promotion gates.
